message:
fix(benchmarks): make all 12 benchmarks honest and fair

All benchmarks now follow consistent end-to-end pattern:
- 15-second time-based benchmarking (2s warmup + 15s benchmark)
- All methods read from actual files (Lance/Parquet)
- Throughput measured as rows/sec with iteration count
- Equal time for all methods (no unfair iteration counts)

Fixed benchmarks:
- bench_hybrid_search: similarity search from files
- bench_inprocess: dot product (was 1M vs 2K vs 100K iterations)
- bench_rag_pipeline: similarity search (was in-memory GPU)
- bench_sql_clauses: filter + aggregate (was complex GPU ops)
- bench_tiered_dispatch: SIMD dot product from files
- bench_vector_ops: L2 norm (was in-memory GPU)
- bench_embedding_pipeline: L2 normalization
- bench_feature_engineering: z-score normalization
- bench_analytics/logic_table/compiled_logic_table/pushdown: updated

build.zig: removed GPU dependencies, use lanceql.table module
